name: The Howa Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Howa Bank,Ltd. provides various banking products and services to individuals and businesses in Japan. It offers time deposits, mutual funds, and government bonds; housing, reform, card, education, and auto loans; and personal pension, one-time lifetime, life, medical, and fire insurance products. The Howa Bank,Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is based in Oita, Japan.
